title: Dukette's Armors
description:
This is a resourcepack that changes the textures of the vanilla armors to be more layered and interesting. 
While being more for the adventurer sort, they are also inspired by armor layouts from different historical periods <3
body: # Armor to travel with These armors are inspired by larp outfits and historical armor, to best achieve a finished look. All are custom designs and can be differentiated from the other sets, yet they are constructed so that armor pieces will look good with the different materials onto the player. --- ### Armor sets ![Set of armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GvuiEF9I/images/c81ab6b0d62ed3c583fdddb33eb003a126b65971.png) --- ![Item icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GvuiEF9I/images/f039c712f96bab3a7166817ef0691f6c9a55476f.png) --- ## Do you want halberds to go with your knightly armor? I've published two halberd resourcepacks, one for a datapack and another for vanilla through renaming. This will lead you to the vanilla one, which can also lead you to the datapack resource-pack! ### Halberds from the pack ![Alternative Halberds](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/RkcWmn5b/images/0c4e034c8a739c506cf165b678f398d7a3d59d21.png) You can click the icon underneath to be redirected to another modrinth page, with the resourcepack ^^ - - **You can find my other stuff here**
